2603.29429.title: CounselReflect: A Toolkit for Auditing Mental-Health Dialogues
2603.29429.paper_summary: Mental-health support is increasingly mediated by conversational systems (e.g., LLM-based tools), but users often lack structured ways to audit the quality and potential risks of the support they receive. We introduce CounselReflect, an end-to-end toolkit for auditing mental-health support dialogues. Rather than producing a single opaque quality score, CounselReflect provides structured, multi-dimensional reports with session-level summaries, turn-level scores, and evidence-linked excerpts to support transparent inspection. The system integrates two families of evaluation signals: (i) 12 model-based metrics produced by task-specific predictors, and (ii) rubric-based metrics that extend coverage via a literature-derived library (69 metrics) and user-defined custom metrics, operationalized with configurable LLM judges. CounselReflect is available as a web application, browser extension, and command-line interface (CLI), enabling use in real-time settings as well as at scale. Human evaluation includes a user study with 20 participants and an expert review with 6 mental-health professionals, suggesting that CounselReflect supports understandable, usable, and trustworthy auditing. A demo video and full source code are also provided.
2603.29429.paper_summary_zh: 心理健康支持越來越多地通過對話系統（例如，基於LLM的工具）來進行，但用戶通常缺乏結構化的方法來審核他們所獲得支持的質量和潛在風險。我們介紹了CounselReflect，這是一個端到端的工具包，用於審核心理健康支持對話。CounselReflect提供結構化的多維報告，包括會話級別的摘要、回合級別的分數和與證據相關的摘錄，以支持透明的檢查，而不是生成單一的不透明質量分數。該系統整合了兩類評估信號：（i）由任務特定預測器生成的12個基於模型的指標，以及（ii）通過文獻衍生的庫（69個指標）和用戶定義的自定義指標擴展覆蓋範圍的基於評分標準的指標，這些指標由可配置的LLM評審進行操作。CounselReflect可作為網頁應用程序、瀏覽器擴展和命令行界面（CLI）使用，支持實時設置以及大規模使用。人類評估包括一項有20名參與者的用戶研究和6名心理健康專業人士的專家評審，表明CounselReflect支持可理解、可用和可信的審核。此外，還提供了演示視頻和完整的源代碼。
2603.29429.author: Yahan Li et.al.
2603.29429.authors: Yahan Li, Chaohao Du, Zeyang Li, Christopher Chun Kuizon, Shupeng Cheng, Angel Hsing-Chi Hwang, Adam C. Frank, Ruishan Liu
